creator: joshruehlig@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 144929
syncthing 'shar' file

Please see the attached 'shar' file. This port also requires a new user & group "syncthing" be added, I choose to use the UID & GID 819.

##ports/UIDs##
syncthing:*:819:819::0:0:syncthing Daemon:/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologin
####

##ports/GIDs##
syncthing:*:819:
####


NOTES
This port closely resembles net-p2p/btsync; syncthing is an open-source alternative that works similarly.

I only include a 64bit version because releases are only posted for FreeBSD 64bit. I believe this port could be adapted to be compiled from source for other architectures as well.
